instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: A present for Sam
task.initialEmail: Hi,||Sam’s birthday is on Friday, and I want to buy him something nice. [1]Do you think a football shirt is a good present?[/1]||[2]How much money can you give?[/2] I don’t want to spend too much.||[3]Where should we go shopping?[/3]||[4]Can you come with me tomorrow afternoon?[/4]||Let me know||Callum

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Callum,||Thanks for your message. [1]Yes, I think a football shirt is a good present because Sam loves football and he watches his team every weekend.[/1]||[2]I can give ten pounds. I know it isn’t a lot, but maybe it will be enough if you add some money too.[/2]||[3]We should go shopping in the sports shop near the station because it has lots of shirts and the prices are usually good.[/3]||[4]I’m sorry, but I can’t come tomorrow afternoon because I have extra maths after school.[/4]||See you soon,||Elliot
